design_brief_requirements: Remove the Overhead (OH) LV cable currently located between pole ref '23' and pole ref '20' on the southern side of Elizabeth Drive
String a new OH cable between pole ref '3' and pole ref '20' on the northern side of Elizabeth Drive
Ensure all LV service works comply with the NSW Service and Installation Rules
Confirm the design adheres to Endeavour Energy standards MDI0031 and MCI0005
New OH road crossing service connection intended to maintain existing services
Spare HV duct as per Fact Sheet 11
Network switching, substation commissioning, contract inspection
All other works required (Customer Funded Contestable Works)
Land Interests as specified in the Land Interest Guidelines (LIG) are required for this project
site_plan_scope_found: REMOVE CONDUCTOR - represented by Dotted line symbol in legend, consistent with removal of existing OH LV cable between pole ref '23' and pole ref '20'
STRING NEW OH CABLE - represented by Short dashed line symbol in legend, consistent with stringing new OH cable between pole ref '3' and pole ref '20'
EXISTING POLE - represented by Small solid black filled circle, supports reference to existing pole refs '23', '20', and '3'
EXISTING OH CABLE - represented by Solid thin line, confirms presence of existing overhead cable infrastructure
EXISTING DUCTS - represented by Thick heavy solid black line, supports reference to spare HV duct works
ENDEAVOUR ENERGY EASEMENT - represented by Faint light grey medium dashed line, partially supports land interest/easement requirement

missing_from_site_plan.item: Compliance with NSW Service and Installation Rules
missing_from_site_plan.note: Compliance standards and regulatory references are not representable as drawing symbols and are entirely absent from the site plan legend and drawing data.

missing_from_site_plan.item: Adherence to Endeavour Energy standards MDI0031 and MCI0005
missing_from_site_plan.note: These specific standard references are not captured anywhere in the site plan legend entries or drawing symbols.

missing_from_site_plan.item: New OH road crossing service connection to maintain existing services
missing_from_site_plan.note: No specific symbol or notation for an OH road crossing service connection is present in the site plan legend. The legend includes STRING NEW OH CABLE but does not distinguish a road crossing service connection specifically.

missing_from_site_plan.item: Spare HV duct as per Fact Sheet 11 (detailed scope)
missing_from_site_plan.note: While EXISTING DUCTS appears in the legend, there is no NEW HV DUCT or SPARE HV DUCT symbol present to confirm the installation of a new spare HV duct as required by Fact Sheet 11. NEW HV TRENCH is present but does not equate to spare duct provision.
This is a financial/funding item and cannot be represented on a site plan. No corresponding annotation or notation is found in the site plan data.

Network switching is referenced as a required work item but no switching symbol (e.g. HV ABS or HV USL in a new/modified state) is explicitly tied to this scope in the site plan data as a new or modified asset.

Substation commissioning is referenced in the design brief but no substation asset (PADMOUNT SUBSTATION or POLE SUBSTATION symbol) is identified as new or being commissioned in the site plan legend entries provided.
Contract inspection is an administrative/procedural requirement and has no representation in the site plan drawing legend or symbol data.

missing_from_site_plan.item: Land Interests as specified in the Land Interest Guidelines (LIG)
missing_from_site_plan.note: While an ENDEAVOUR ENERGY EASEMENT boundary symbol exists in the legend, the LIG requirement and any specific easement boundaries required for this project are not explicitly detailed or confirmed as present in the site plan data beyond the generic legend entry.

method_of_supply_comparison.summary: The site plan legend data partially supports the method of supply requirements described in the Design Brief. Key physical works are represented — removal of existing OH LV cable (REMOVE CONDUCTOR symbol), stringing of new OH cable (STRING NEW OH CABLE symbol), and existing infrastructure references (EXISTING POLE, EXISTING OH CABLE, EXISTING DUCTS) are all present in the legend. However, several significant items from the Design Brief are absent or insufficiently represented in the site plan: compliance standards (NSW SIR, MDI0031, MCI0005) are entirely absent as these are non-graphical; the specific OH road crossing service connection is not distinguished from general OH cabling; spare HV duct provision per Fact Sheet 11 lacks a dedicated new symbol; network switching and substation commissioning have no clearly associated new or modified assets shown; and administrative items such as duct usage charges, contract inspection, and LIG easement specifics are not captured in the drawing data. Overall, the site plan addresses the primary physical LV works but is insufficient in representing the full scope of HV, substation, compliance, administrative, and easement requirements stated in the Design Brief.

drawing_scope_found: STRING NEW OH CABLE - Short dashed line symbol in legend corresponds to stringing new OH cable between pole refs, matching the LV works item for new OH cable on northern side of Elizabeth Drive
REMOVE CONDUCTOR - Dotted line symbol in legend corresponds to removal of existing OH LV cable between pole ref '23' and pole ref '20'
EXISTING DUCTS - Thick heavy solid black line symbol in legend corresponds to existing duct infrastructure relevant to HV duct and duct usage charge items
EXISTING POLE - Small solid black filled circle in legend corresponds to existing poles referenced (pole ref '20', '23', '3')
NEW POLE - Small hollow open circle in legend provides for any new pole works under contestable scope

missing_from_drawing.item: Spare HV duct as per Fact Sheet 11
missing_from_drawing.design_brief_reference: Determination of Funding, Page 4 - capital contribution by Endeavour Energy
missing_from_drawing.note: No NEW HV TRENCH or dedicated spare HV duct symbol is identifiably depicted or labelled in the legend entries or site plan data to specifically confirm the spare HV duct installation scope. While EXISTING DUCTS appears in the legend, no new HV duct installation (NEW HV TRENCH with slash marks) is confirmed as placed on the drawing for this specific item.

missing_from_drawing.design_brief_reference: Determination of Funding, Page 4 - reimbursement by Customer
missing_from_drawing.note: This is a financial/administrative charge item with no corresponding graphical drawing element. There is no symbol or legend entry in the site plan that represents a duct usage charge. This is a funding obligation only and cannot be verified against any drawing depiction.

missing_from_drawing.item: Network switching, substation commissioning, contract inspection
missing_from_drawing.design_brief_reference: Determination of Funding, Page 4 - customer funded non-contestable works
missing_from_drawing.note: No substation symbol (PADMOUNT SUBSTATION or POLE SUBSTATION) or HV switching equipment symbol (HV ABS N/C or HV USL N/C) is referenced in the site plan data as being present on the drawing for this project. Substation commissioning and network switching works are not visually accounted for in the drawing scope. The legend contains these symbols but no site plan asset record confirms their placement.

missing_from_drawing.item: New OH road crossing service connection
missing_from_drawing.design_brief_reference: Method Of Supply Requirement, Page 2 - Service Connections
missing_from_drawing.note: While the legend includes STRING NEW OH CABLE, there is no specific symbol or legend entry for an OH road crossing service connection. The road crossing aspect of the service connection is not distinctly captured in the legend or drawing, leaving this sub-scope element unaccounted for in the drawing depictions.

missing_from_drawing.item: All other works required (Customer funded contestable works - general scope)
missing_from_drawing.design_brief_reference: Determination of Funding, Page 4 - customer funded contestable works
missing_from_drawing.note: This is a broad catch-all contestable works item with no specific scope definition in the design brief data. Without explicit enumeration of what 'all other works' entails, it is not possible to verify completeness of drawing coverage. Several legend entries (NEW LV TRENCH, NEW PILLAR, NEW COLUMN, NEW LANTERN, LV LINK N/O) exist but none are confirmed as placed assets in the site plan data, meaning potential contestable civil or equipment works may be missing from the drawing.

funding_arrangement_comparison.summary: Of the 7 funded work items identified in the Design Brief, 2 items (removal of OH LV cable and stringing of new OH cable) have clear corresponding legend symbols in the drawing (REMOVE CONDUCTOR and STRING NEW OH CABLE respectively). Existing pole references are supported by the EXISTING POLE legend entry. However, 5 items have gaps or cannot be fully verified against the drawing scope: (1) the spare HV duct installation lacks a confirmed NEW HV TRENCH depiction on the drawing; (2) the duct usage charge is a financial obligation with no graphical representation possible; (3) network switching, substation commissioning and contract inspection works lack any substation or HV switching symbol confirmed as placed on the site plan; (4) the OH road crossing service connection has no distinct legend symbol to differentiate it from general OH stringing works; and (5) the catch-all contestable works item is too broadly defined to confirm complete drawing coverage. The drawing legend is comprehensive in available symbols, but the absence of confirmed asset placements in the site plan data for HV and substation-related works represents a material gap between the funded scope in the Design Brief and what is visually depicted in the drawing.
